usageDescriptions.camera: Yeonjang needs camera access so Nobie can capture still images from this Mac.
usageDescriptions.microphone: Reserved for future camera and media extensions.
usageDescriptions.appleEvents: Yeonjang may control local applications for Nobie automation tasks.

screenRecording.note: macOS Screen Recording permission is requested at runtime before screen capture. No additional code-signing entitlement is configured because Apple does not document a supported screen-capture entitlement for this use case.

notes: Camera access is managed by Windows privacy settings.
No separate application manifest has been added yet.
Camera access depends on device permissions and desktop portal configuration.
No desktop portal manifest has been added yet.
